creator: iron.udjin@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

Please update www/minio port version up to recent stable release. Currently it is: RELEASE.2021-12-10T23-03-39Z

Current version of minio (2021.10.23.03.28.24) has a bug (https://github.com/minio/minio/pull/13864) which is already fixed and included to 2021-12-09T06-19-41Z release.

Thank you.
